name: Regen Coordination Hub
summary: Public forum, chapter directory, and coordination surface for Greenpill and allied regen work.
description: The Regen Coordination Hub is a public Discourse surface used for chapter updates, proposals, Greenpill Garden coordination, website revamp discussion, and network-level knowledge work. It appears at hub.regencoordination.xyz and hub.greenpill.network.

seo.title: Regen Coordination Hub · Greenpill Network
seo.description: The Regen Coordination Hub is Greenpill's public forum for chapter updates, proposals, and program coordination.
